tests.test_name: Swift - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a single Swift test file receives properly structured documentation output with no missing values.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis produces visible output after processing the Swift file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or blanks
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Swift
At least one test case is detected and documented from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case carries a meaningful name in the output

tests.test_name: Swift - PO - struct+for data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a data-driven Swift test file sees each data row expanded into its own individual test case in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis produces visible output after processing the data-driven Swift file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or blanks
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Swift
Data-driven rows are each expanded into separate documented test cases, producing at least 3 entries

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case carries a meaningful name in the output

tests.test_name: Swift - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a single Swift test file receives output that includes a populated coverage matrix alongside the core test documentation.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis produces visible output after processing the Swift file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or blanks
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Swift
At least one test case is detected and documented from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case carries a meaningful name in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test case

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a data-driven Swift test file sees all data rows collapsed into a single test case whose coverage matrix rows match the number of data examples.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis produces visible output after processing the data-driven Swift file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or blanks
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Swift
Data-driven rows are collapsed into a single documented test case for the QA Manager view

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test case carries a meaningful name in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The number of rows in the coverage matrix equals the number of data-driven input rows from the Swift file

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'swift'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected Swift-specific field structure
